titleStmt.title: SII 23.104: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 104. (A.R. No. 104 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri-Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the same wall Jat. Kulaśēkhara I: year 9+3: 1201-02 A.D.

summary.p: This is an inscription recording the gift of one achchu made by a certain Kāḍi Nārāyaṇaṉ Śī-Kayilāyamuḍaiyaṉ alias Vijaiyarāyar, for a special offering of tiruppōnagam to the deity with 1 kalam of rice, ghee, curd etc. on the day of a festival in Kṛittikā in Kārttigai month every year in the temple of Nālāyira Viṇṇagar-Emberumāṉ, with the interest on the amount endowed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Figure of a lampstand svastiśrī . koccaṭaiyavaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟkku yāṇṭu 9- Etir muvāmāṇṭu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīirājarājacaturvedimaṅkalattu teṉ piṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicci nālāyiraviṇṇakar Emperumāṉu
kku kāṭi nārāyaṇaṉ cikaiyilāyamuṭaiyāṉāṉa vicaiyarāyar Ivem perumāṉukku kāttikaimāsattu kāttikai kāttikaiyiṉ Aṉṟu puṟap paṭṭaruḷi Aṟunāḻikkālāle kala Arici peruntiruppoṉakam neyamutu nā
ḻiyu 5 10 2 tayiramutu kaṟiyamutu maṟṟu veñcaṉāti Uṭppaṭa poliyūṭṭu koṇṭe cantrātittavaṟ celvatāka Iṭṭa Accu 1 Ivvaccukoṇ ṭe celvatāṉamaikku svasti .
Digital edition of SII 23.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
